settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences here.

accent.title: Accent color
accent.description: Choose the accent palette used across the app.

tableLayout.title: Table layout
tableLayout.description: How the habit table is arranged (week and month).
tableLayout.proHint: Choosing a layout is a Pro feature.

habits.resizeColumn: Resize the Habit column (drag, or double-click to reset)
habits.empty: Add your first habit to start tracking.

form.subtitle: Name it — the icon is picked automatically.
form.name: Name
form.proHint: Color and icon are set automatically. Upgrade to Pro to customize them.

delete.title: Delete habit?
delete.description: Delete "{{name}}" and all its check-ins? This can't be undone.

heatmap.title: Year in review
heatmap.locked: The yearly heatmap is a Pro feature.

mood.title: Mood & habits
mood.completionUp: You tend to feel better on days when you complete most of your habits.
mood.completionDown: You tend to feel better on lighter days, when you complete fewer of your habits and rest.
mood.completionFlat: Your mood barely depends on how many habits you complete.
mood.completionBasis: Based on {{count}} days with a logged mood.
mood.empty: Not enough data yet — log your mood for a few more days (we need at least 5 days both with and without a habit done).
mood.higher: Higher average mood on days you do this
mood.lower: Lower average mood on days you do this
mood.disclaimer: Shows mood linked to habits, not what causes it.

empty.title: No stats yet
empty.hint: Add a habit and start checking it off to see your statistics.

auth.name: Name
auth.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Invalid data. Please check and try again.
